diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Daniel. How can I help?
[Caller] Hi Daniel. Quick question — I'm 80 pulls in on the current banner and I want to know if I'm in soft pity.
[Agent] Great question. Let me verify your account so I can look up your exact numbers. UID please?
[Caller] 803990456.
[Agent] Email for verification?
[Caller] apatel at email dot com.
[Agent] Verified. Let me pull the pity data for the current character event banner. Confirmed — you're at 80 pulls since your last 5-star, which means yes, you're in soft pity territory. Soft pity starts at pull 75, and between pulls 75 and 89 the 5-star drop rate jumps dramatically. Statistically, most 5-stars land between pull 76 and pull 83.
[Caller] Oh that's reassuring. I've been nervous.
[Agent] That's completely understandable — the wait between 75 and hitting the 5-star always feels longer than it is. Good news is the odds are very much in your favor right now. If you have the primos and fates, the next 10 pulls have the highest chance you'll ever see on this banner.
[Caller] OK, that's helpful to hear. Thanks for not just quoting policy at me.
[Agent] Of course. One thing — want me to enable the pull-count tips in your in-game notifications? It'll show you soft-pity status each time you open the wish screen.
[Caller] Yes, please enable that.
[Agent] Done. Anything else on the gacha side?
[Caller] No, I'm good. Thanks Daniel!
[Agent] Happy pulling, Aisha!
